message:
feat(webgpu): add GPU-accelerated hash grouping for GROUP BY

Implements parallel hash-based grouping and per-group aggregation for large
datasets (10,000+ rows). Falls back to CPU Map-based grouping for smaller datasets.

- Add group_by.wgsl shader with hash build, group assign, and aggregation kernels
- Add GPUGrouper class with groupBy() and groupAggregate() methods
- Support COUNT, SUM, MIN, MAX per-group aggregations using atomics
- Add 2 Playwright tests for GPU GROUP BY correctness and edge cases
